tree.name: Kyrie Irving
tree.tradeDescription: DAL traded Spencer Dinwiddie, Dorian Finney-Smith, 2027 2nd, 2029 1st, and 2029 2nd to BKN for Kyrie Irving and Markieff Morris
tree.note: Duke guard, 2011 #1 overall pick by Cleveland

assetsGivenUp.name: Spencer Dinwiddie
